lyrics.jp: 大丈夫、痛みにとっても弱いから
lyrics.romaji: Daijoubu, itami ni tottemo yowai kara
lyrics.en: It's okay, because I'm very weak when it comes to pain

lyrics.jp: 大丈夫、憧れは時に憧れのまんま
lyrics.romaji: Daijoubu, akogare wa toki ni akogare no manma
lyrics.en: It's okay, sometimes our yearnings remain as they are

lyrics.jp: 愛、ジョーク、それとたまにキツめのネガティブ
lyrics.romaji: Ai, jooku, sore to tama ni kitsume no negatibu
lyrics.en: Love, jokes, and sometimes a bit of negativity

lyrics.jp: それでいつも元通りさ
lyrics.romaji: Sore de itsumo moto doori sa
lyrics.en: That's how we always go back to being ourselves

lyrics.jp: 君と僕との間柄なら　そりゃ出くわす問題もさまざま
lyrics.romaji: Kimi to boku to no aidagara nara sorya dekuwasu mondai mo samazama
lyrics.en: If it's between you and me, we'll encounter all kinds of problems

lyrics.jp: だから隣にいりゃ旅の道すがら　どんな闇からも命からがら
lyrics.romaji: Dakara tonari ni irya tabi no michisugara donna yami kara mo inochi karagara
lyrics.en: But if we're side by side on our journey, we'll barely escape any darkness

lyrics.jp: 助けるよ　助けてよ　My Buddy Darling
lyrics.romaji: Tasukeru yo tasukete yo My Buddy Darling
lyrics.en: I'll save you, save me, My Buddy Darling

lyrics.jp: SOSが不器用でも気にしないからもう
lyrics.romaji: SOS ga bukiyou demo ki ni shinai kara mou
lyrics.en: Even if your SOS is clumsy, I don't mind anymore

lyrics.jp: 素っ気ないくらいで僕らはちょうどいいんじゃない？
lyrics.romaji: Sokkenai kurai de bokura wa choudo iin janai?
lyrics.en: Isn't it just right for us to be a little distant?

lyrics.jp: きっと涙も言葉もおまけでもいいんじゃない？
lyrics.romaji: Kitto namida mo kotoba mo omake demo iin janai?
lyrics.en: Maybe tears and words are just extras?
